    Royals Select Ben Kudrna, Steven Zobac
    The Royals announced that they have selected right-handers Ben Kudrna and Steven Zobac to their 40-man roster. That protects both players from being selected in next month’s Rule 5 draft. Kansas City’s 40-man roster count climbs from 37 to 39. The 22-year-old Kudrna was a second-rounder back in 2021. He’s long ranked among the top…  ( 8 min )

  • Open

    Denny's 2025 Holiday Menu Arrives
    Denny's 2025 holiday menu has arrived, anchored by the returning Rudolph Pancakes, which are themed after Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer. The pancake is available on its own and as part of an Everyday Value Slam. An à la carte order of Rudolph Pancakes features two buttermilk pancakes arranged to make Rudolph's head decorated with turkey bacon antlers, whipped cream dollops, chocolate eyes, and a strawberry for Rudolph's red nose. The Rudolph Everyday Value Slam includes Rudolph Pancakes and two eggs. Prices vary, but the Slam is priced at $6.99 near me in the Los Angeles area, while the pancakes alone are $5. As a holiday promotion, Denny's Kids Eat Free deal is now available every day, from 4PM to 10PM, for a limited time. Under the terms of the offer, you can get a free Kids Meal with the purchase of each adult entree when dining in at participating locations nationwide. Other seasonal holiday items available now at Denny's include: - New Cinnamon Apple Crisp Pancake Slam - Two buttermilk pancakes cooked with cinnamon crumb topping, topped with warm apple crisp, salted caramel sauce, and powdered sugar. The pancakes are served with two eggs, hash browns, and two applewood-smoked bacon strips or two pork sausage links. - New Cold Brew Flavors - For a limited time, you can get cold brew coffee in three new seasonal flavors:  Salted Caramel - Cold brew mixed with milk and caramel syrup, poured over ice, and topped with whipped cream and caramel sauce. Peppermint Mocha - Cold brew mixed with milk and peppermint syrup, poured over ice, and topped with whipped cream and chocolate sauce. Sweet & Creamy - Cold brew mixed with milk and cane syrup, poured over ice. - New Peppermint Hot Chocolate - Hot chocolate mixed with peppermint syrup and topped with whipped cream. Photo via Denny's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Dutch Bros Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Dutch Bros readies for the holidays with the release of its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning seasonal drinks. This year's holiday menu is available now at all Dutch Bros locations for a limited time and includes: - New Mistletoe Rebel - Raspberry and pomegranate flavors mixed with the chain's signature Rebel energy drink, and decorated with a green glitter glaze. You can get it blended, iced, or as a lemonade (a non-caffeinated option). - New Holiday Cookie Freeze - Espresso, sweet cream, and vanilla, swirled with jingle sprinkles and finished with Soft Top and more jingle sprinkles. You can also get it as a shake or iced latte. - New Jingle Nog Latte - Espresso and holiday nog, topped with Soft Top and jingle sprinkles. - New Jingle Chai Nog - Chai and holiday nog, topped with Soft Top and jingle sprinkles. - Hazelnut Truffle Mocha - A hazelnut mocha topped with Soft Top and a caramel drizzle. You can get it iced, hot, or as a Freeze.  -  Candy Cane Mocha - Espresso, peppermint flavor, and chocolate milk, crowned with Soft Top and candy cane sprinkles. You can get it iced, hot, as a Freeze, as a cold brew, or as a hot cocoa.  This year's holiday drinks come in one of six holiday-themed cups. Iced holiday drinks also come with a limited-edition straw. Photo via Dutch Bros. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Krystal Introduces New Expanded Patty Melt Lineup
    Krystal builds upon its recently updated Classic Patty Melt with a new, limited-time expanded Patty Melt menu. Here's what the lineup looks like (with suggested prices listed): - Classic Patty Melt ($5.79; also available in a combo for $9.79) - A 3-ounce burger patty, caramelized onions, and melted American cheese served on grilled, buttery toast. - New Chipotle Patty Melt ($6.79; also available in a combo for $10.79) - A 3-ounce burger patty, caramelized onions, melted American cheese, jalapenos, and Hellmann's Chipotle Mayo, served on grilled, buttery toast. - New Bacon & Egg Patty Melt (available all day for $6.99; also available in a combo for $10.99) - Bacon, a fried egg, American cheese, caramelized onions, and a 3-oz burger patty, served on grilled, buttery toast. - New Chipotle Bacon & Egg Patty Melt (available all day for $7.29; also available in a combo for $11.29) - Bacon, a fried egg, American cheese, caramelized onions, a 3-oz burger patty, jalapeno, and Hellmann's Chipotle Mayo, served on grilled, buttery toast. The new Patty Melts are available now for a limited time through January 11, 2026, at participating Krystal locations chain-wide. Photo via Krystal. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Crumbl Bakes Banana Pudding and More Through November 22, 2025
    Crumbl's weekly rotation of cookies and other desserts includes Banana Pudding and more this week. Here's what's on deck at Crumbl for the week ending November 22, 2025 (I'm a bit surprised there isn't more of a Thanksgiving theme): - Banana Pudding - Layers of banana, vanilla pudding, and vanilla wafers, topped with whipped cream and vanilla wafer crumbs - Cookies & Creme Tres Leche Cake - A dark chocolate cake soaked in classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream, and cookies & cream streusel. - Peanut Butter Cup Skillet Cookie featuring Reese's - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with peanut butter cup mousse, a drizzle of melted milk chocolate, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cup pieces. - Double Fudge Brownie Cookie - A warm brownie cookie topped with a chocolate glaze and brownie bites. - Blueberry Pancake Cookie - A warm blueberry pancake cookie topped with a blueberry buttermilk glaze and a dollop of buttercream. - Iced Oatmeal Cookie - A warm cinnamon oatmeal cookie covered in vanilla cream cheese glaze. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. Crumbl also continues to offer a "Secret Menu," which is a cookie or other dessert chosen by each location. You can find what's being offered through the Crumbl website or mobile app. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Holiday Pie is Back at McDonald's
    The Holiday Pie is back at participating McDonald's restaurants nationwide for the 2025 holiday season. The seasonal treat features a turnover-style, baked pie with a creamy custard encased in a buttery, sugar-glazed crust embedded with rainbow sprinkles. You can find my previous review of it here. Prices vary with location, but the Holiday Pie costs $2.49 or two for $4.25 at a local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. It replaced the Pumpkin and Creme Pie. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Review: Wendy's - Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion
    Wendy's Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion features a Vanilla (or Chocolate) Frosty swirled with new snickerdoodle sauce and topped with snickerdoodle cookie crumbles. It cost me $4.19 for a small, and I went with the vanilla version. Unlike a McFlurry or a Blizzard, the Frosty Fusion is only mixed for a few seconds (if that). The sauce remained mostly drizzled on the sides and bottom of the cup, resulting in a mild cinnamon note to the creamy Vanilla Frosty and a much sweeter, more pronounced cinnamon taste whenever the sauce was encountered. Interestingly, the sauce contained visible flecks of cinnamon. The snickerdoodle cookie crumbles on top had the requisite mix of sweet vanilla and cinnamon flavors. They were super crunchy (although this experience may vary), providing a nice contrast to the smooth Frosty and liquid sauce. Overall, I enjoyed Wendy's Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion a good deal. I like snickerdoodles, and the flavor was captured well here. I especially liked the hearty crunch of the cookies on top as that can be hit-or-miss with this type of dessert. Nutritional Info - Wendy's Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion Calories - 410 Fat - 11g (Saturated Fat - 6g) Sodium - 320mg Carbs - 70g (Sugar - 56g) Protein - 9g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    McRib Returns to Select McDonald's Restaurants
    It's McRib season once again at McDonald's, but you can only find the barbecue sauce-slathered pork patty at participating locations in select regions. Cities where the McRib is available for a limited time include Miami, Dallas, Cleveland, St. Louis, Atlanta, Chicago, Seattle, Los Angeles, and more. The McRib features a seasoned boneless pork patty shaped like a rack of ribs and slathered in barbecue sauce and served with slivered onions and pickles on a toasted cornmeal-dusted roll. Prices vary, but the McRib costs $6.29 at my local McDonald's in Los Angeles. The combo, which includes the sandwich, medium fries, and a medium drink, costs $11.29. Photo via McDonald's.  Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Shake Shack's 2025 Holiday Shakes Arrive
    Shake Shack introduces two seasonal shakes for the 2025 holiday season: the Christmas Cookie Shake and the Sticky Toffee Pudding Shake. Available for a limited time, the shakes are inspired by traditional holiday desserts. The returning Christmas Cookie Shake features a sweet, buttery frozen custard blended with milk and topped with whipped cream and holiday sprinkles. The new Sticky Toffee Pudding Shake features sticky toffee pudding (a type of steamed cake) spun with vanilla frozen custard and caramelized brown sugar, topped with whipped cream and a drizzle of sticky toffee pudding sauce. Prices vary, but both holiday shakes cost $6.99 each here in the Los Angeles area. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Taco Bell Unveils New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Featuring Poblano Peppers
    Taco Bell today announced the nationwide launch of its new Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla, featuring poblano peppers, at participating locations starting November 20, 2025. The Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla features marinated steak, fire-roasted poblano peppers, melty cheese blend, and Spicy Ranch sauce, all wrapped in a grilled flour tortilla. The new quesadilla will […] The post Taco Bell Unveils New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Featuring Poblano Peppers appeared first on The Fast Food Post.  ( 19 min )

    Krispy Kreme Updates Donut Menu with Nine New Flavors
    Krispy Kreme updates its donut menu with the addition of nine new flavors. Five of the donuts are permanent, while four are seasonal. The latest additions include: - New York Cheesecake - A donut dipped in vanilla-flavored icing, topped with graham crunch, and filled with cheesecake-flavored Kreme. - Oreo Cookies and Kreme - A donut filled with Oreo cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in chocolate icing, topped with Oreo cookie pieces and a drizzle of vanilla-flavored icing. - Original Glazed Cake - An old-fashioned cake donut covered in the chain's signature Original Glaze. - Cinnamon Apple Filled - A donut filled with apple cinnamon filling and tossed in a powdered cinnamon-flavored coating. - Original Glazed Kreme Filled Donut - An Original Glazed donut filled with Kreme filling. - Biscoff…  ( 16 min )
    Checkers & Rally's Introduces New $5 Pretzel Pubster Combo
    Checkers & Rally's launches its new $5 Pretzel Pubster Combo as the chain's latest value meal. The new Pretzel Pubster Burger features two beef patties, melted beer cheese with bacon crumbles, American cheese, mayo, and crispy onions, served on a toasted pretzel bun. The $5 meal also includes Famous Seasoned Fries and a small fountain drink (the burger by itself costs $3.99 near me in the Los Angeles area). The fast-food chain also offers a bigger take on a pretzel burger in the new BBQ Pretzel Buford. With a suggested price of $7.49, the burger features two large beef patties, American cheese, two bacon strips, crispy-fried onions, Sweet & Smoky BBQ sauce, and mayo, on a toasted pretzel bun. Checkers & Rally's is also offering Classic Wings for $1 each for the fall sports season. The bone-in wings are available plain or tossed in one of several sauces, including new Frank's Stingin' Honey Garlic Sauce, Medium Buffalo Sauce, Angry Buffalo Sauce, Garlic Parmesan Sauce, and Sweet & Smoky BBQ. Photo via Checkers & Rally's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Pizza Hut Brings Back Triple Treat Box for 2025 Holiday Season
    The Triple Treat Box is back at Pizza Hut for the 2025 holiday season. Available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide, the holiday-themed combo features two medium one-topping pizzas, five breadsticks, and 10 cinnamon sticks, all packed in limited-edition holiday packaging for $19.99 (may vary). The items can be swapped out and/or customized for an additional charge (like if you wanted an additional topping or a different dessert). Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Del Taco Puts Together New $2.99 Micro Meal
    Calling it a "bite-sized meal deal that proves good things really do come in small packages," Del Taco has launched the new Micro Meal priced at $2.99. Available for a limited time, the mini combo meal includes a Micro Beef & Cheddar Burrito, 7 to 10 Crinkle-Cut Fries, and a Donut Bite. The Micro Beef & Cheddar Burrito is a smaller version of the chain's Beef & Cheddar Burrito. It features seasoned beef, grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. The value-priced meal is available now at participating Del Taco locations chain-wide through November 23, 2025. Photo via Del Taco. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Peppermint Chip is Back at Chick-fil-A
    Peppermint Chip has returned to the Chick-fil-A menu for the 2025 holiday season. Chicken Tortilla Soup is also back for the winter. Chick-fil-A's returning Peppermint Chip lineup includes a trio of beverages: - Peppermint Chip Milkshake - Chick-fil-A's Icedream frozen dairy dessert blended with peppermint syrup and peppermint bark chips, topped with whipped cream and a maraschino cherry. - Peppermint Chip Frosted Coffee - Cold-brewed coffee, peppermint syrup, and peppermint bark chips blended with Icedream frozen dairy dessert. - Peppermint Iced Coffee - Cold-brewed coffee sweetened with pure cane syrup and peppermint syrup. Chicken Tortilla Soup is a winter staple for Chick-fil-A that features shredded chicken breast, navy beans, and black beans in a creamy white soup base with a blend of vegetables (including onions, corn, bell peppers, and celery) and spicy heat. It's served with seasoned corn tortilla strips for topping. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Starbucks Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Starbucks has unveiled its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning holiday food and beverages. Here's what you'll find on this year's menu: - Peppermint Mocha - Signature Espresso, steamed milk, mocha sauce, and peppermint-flavored syrup, topped with whipped cream and dark chocolate curls. It's available hot, iced, or as a Frappuccino. - Caramel Brulee Latte - Signature Espresso, steamed milk, and caramel brulee sauce, topped with whipped cream and caramel brulee topping. It's available hot, iced, or as a Frappuccino. - Iced Sugar Cookie Latte - Blonde Espresso, ice, 2% milk, and sugar cookie-flavored syrup, topped with red and green sprinkles. It's available hot, iced, or as a Frappuccino. - Iced Sugar Cookie Breve - A variant of the Iced Sugar Cookie Latte made with half-and-half…  ( 16 min )

    Rays Trade Kameron Misner To Royals
    The Rays announced Monday that they’ve traded outfielder Kameron Misner to the Royals in exchange for a player to be named later or cash. Tampa Bay had designated Misner for assignment last week. The Royals’ 40-man roster count climbs to 36. Misner, 28 in January, has received limited big league action with the Rays over…  ( 10 min )
    Royals Add Marcus Thames To Coaching Staff
    The Royals are hiring former big league outfielder and veteran coach Marcus Thames as a hitting coach, reports Anne Rogers of MLB.com. He’ll join recently hired Connor Dawson, 32, as a second hitting coach under senior director of hitting Alec Zumwalt. Kansas City did not renew the contracts of now-former assistant hitting coaches Joe Dillon…  ( 9 min )

    2025 Veterans Day Deals and Specials
    Tuesday, November 11, 2025, is Veterans Day, and to celebrate and honor the brave men and women of our armed services (past and present), many food and drink chains are offering Veterans Day promotions, so here's a list of 2025 Veterans Day deals and specials: - Applebee's - On November 11, all Active-Duty Military, Veterans, Reserves, and National Guard members can get a free full-sized entree (dine-in only) from an exclusive Veterans Day Menu. The 2025 Veterans Day Menu includes seven of Applebee's most popular entrees, including a 6-oz. Top Sirloin, Classic Bacon Cheeseburger, Chicken Tenders Platter, Double Crunch Shrimp, Fiesta Lime Chicken, Oriental Chicken Salad, and Three-Cheese Chicken Penne. Additionally, they will receive a $5 Bounce Back Card to redeem on their order within a …  ( 20 min )
